details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements are met: (1) Stats(StatsArgs) variant added with human bool flag, (2) cache_stats function properly iterates buckets with CacheBucket::iter() chain and computes sizes with DiskUsage, (3) function is pub(crate) and returns ExitStatus::Success, (4) --human/-H flag properly uses human_readable_bytes(), (5) output includes per-bucket lines with separator and total line, (6) module properly registered in mod.rs with use statement, (7) dispatch wiring correctly placed in lib.rs matching CacheCommand::Stats, (8) code follows identical patterns to existing cache size command. Additionally includes comprehensive tests, proper preview feature gating, test helper methods, and output filtering utilities.
